question: According to the percentage labels in the chart, which region has the largest sales share?

options.A: South has the largest sales share.
options.B: Central has the largest sales share.
options.C: East has the largest sales share.
options.D: North has the largest sales share.

explanation: From the labels, North has the highest share (52%). The bars' heights are not proportional to the percentages (they use a separate 'height' value), which can mislead viewers into thinking East is largest when relying on visual comparison.
